case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS SHAW PIPELINE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,190.50 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE
